description: Introduction to the principles of polymer processing. Review of the basic techniques primarily in use by industry as well as foundational principles of polymer physics, viscoelasticity and rheology. Focus on understanding how design of process is used to achieve desired structure and properties. Includes introduction to topics such as 3-d printing and recycling of polymer waste in the context of reprocessing such materials.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: E P D 636and (E P D 640orCHEM/​M S & E  421, or concurrent enrollment), or declared in Capstone Certificate in Polymer Processing  Manufacturing
